hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Villa Bella Vista in Ambatoloaka offers a holiday home with a swimming pool boasting stunning sea views, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. Guests enjoy free WiFi throughout the property.
Comfortable Amenities: The property features a private check-in and check-out service, a 24-hour front desk, and a shared kitchen. Additional amenities include a lounge, outdoor seating area, barbecue facilities, and a washing machine.
Convenient Location: Ambatoloaka Beach is an 8-minute walk away, while Lokobe Reserve lies 6 km from the property. Mount Passot is 29 km distant, and Fascene Airport is 21 km away. Scuba diving opportunities enhance the surrounding area.

Beachfront Location: Remo e Berenice in Anjiabe, Nosy Komba offers direct beachfront access with stunning sea views. Guests can relax on the sun terrace or enjoy the lush garden.
Comfortable Accommodations: The guest house features family rooms with private bathrooms, including ground-floor units. Each room offers a terrace, wardrobe, and free toiletries.
Dining Experience: A family-friendly restaurant serves French and Italian cuisines in a welcoming ambience. Outdoor seating areas provide a pleasant setting for meals.
Leisure Activities: Guests can enjoy water sports facilities, snorkelling, and walking tours. The property also offers culture and cooking classes, ensuring a memorable stay.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Mareva in Hell-Ville offers a spacious apartment with free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a private bathroom. The kitchen includes a refrigerator, stovetop, microwave, and coffee machine.
Convenient Facilities: Guests benefit from free on-site private parking, paid airport shuttle service, daily housekeeping, and full-day security. The ground-floor unit features a terrace with city views and outdoor furniture.
Local Attractions: Lokobe Reserve is 4.6 km away, Mount Passot 31 km, and Fascene Airport 13 km from the property.
